title: Vanavil
desc: Surya, Prakash and Priya are three IAS aspirants. When Surya and Priya fall in love, Prakash, Priya's secret admirer, silently becomes an enemy posing as a friend and plots to get rid of Surya.

title: Pathavi Pramanam
desc: Siva breaks out of prison after unsuccessfully trying to kill a politician. He later bypasses the politician's security, kidnaps him, and goes to a television station to reveal his motives.

title: Amman
desc: Bhavani is an orphan and an ardent devotee of Goddess Ammoru. The goddess comes to Bhavani's rescue when a vengeful and evil Ghorakh intends to ruin her life.

title: Yes Madam
desc: When Sumati and her son move into the house opposite theirs, Gayatri gets shocked to learn that she is her husband, Sivaramakrishnan's first wife.

title: Thirudi Thirudan
desc: After failing to pursue their dreams, two people run away from their respective homes. When they happen to travel on the same train, an unexpected incident changes the course of their lives.

title: Aadikkam
desc: Naga, a thug, assists a corrupt officer in kidnapping a journalist who exposed him. However, after witnessing the officer's unethical behaviour, Naga resolves to mend his ways.

title: Fillers
desc: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Solla Marantha Kathai
desc: Sivadhanu, an educated but unemployed honest man, gets married to the daughter of a rich man and moves to their house. However, taunts and disrespect compel him to find a new job in another town.
